evidence.scope: The asymptotic consequence of the exact finite-field formulas as q grows through odd prime powers.
evidence.summary: The exact formalized counts imply the limit; the S3 fixed-point match is an arithmetic interpretation.

limitations: The pinned repository does not formalize irreducibility or S3 monodromy.

scope: The asymptotic consequence of the exact finite-field formulas as q grows through odd prime powers.
statement: The normalized finite-field fiber-count distribution (N_0,N_1,N_3)/q^3 tends to (1/3,1/2,1/6), matching the proportions of elements of S3 with 0, 1, and 3 fixed points.
title: Asymptotic S3 fiber distribution
